title: Tuttas Retextures: Runes Edition
description: Mystic Runes Reimagined; Progressive Pouches Included.
body:
A resource pack that reimagines all the runes and their pouches from the [Runes Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/runes)!!

This retexture focuses on improving the clarity of each rune’s material and the visual consistency of pouch size progression.

**This Resource Packs includes these changes:**

- Complete redesign of all runes (including Soul and Electric runes).
- Redesigned rune pouches with clearer visuals showing their capacity and progression.

I'm very happy with the result, and I hope you enjoy playing with this as much as I do! jiijijiiji
